news.paragraph: Energy stocks have recently demonstrated upward momentum, with reports of rallies during late Thursday and pre-market Friday sessions. While an oil surge is providing support, traders should monitor potential headwinds from higher yields and geopolitical uncertainty surrounding a U.S.-China summit. No specific earnings or regulatory catalysts are explicitly mentioned in the recent news.
